title: Association Meetings - Canada.ca
content:
## Association Meetings
Health Canada meets on a regular basis with industry, research, and healthcare professionals' associations to exchange information and discuss issues.
Pharmaceutical Drugs Directorate (PDD) Bilateral Meeting Program
Please note that only meeting notes from the past two years are posted and that previous meeting notes are available upon request.
- Canadian Generic Pharmaceutical Association ( CGPA )
- Groupement provincial de l'industrie du médicament ( GPIM )
- Innovative Medicines Canada (IMC)
- National Association of Pharmacy Regulatory Authorities ( NAPRA )
- Canada's Medical Technology Companies ( MEDEC )
